text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Given that it's Valentine's Day, I'd like you to
have this.
choice_data_list: Huh? You prepared this for me?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I suspected you'd be surprised. I suppose it stands
to reason, as I'm unaccustomed to Valentine's
traditions.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That said...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: If you want to show someone how you feel, it's super important to choose just the right chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Including an extra present on top of that might
also be a nice way to add a special touch.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You've also gotta make sure the chocolates are
different from the ones you give everyone else,
so the person knows they're special! That's a
romance comic staple!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, can I borrow you for a minute—hey, what
are you reading?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! I-I'll be there in a sec!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
"Valentine's Day is an occasion for sharing your
feelings with the person you hold dear."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
"Give that special someone some special
chocolates to show them how you feel!"

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm, so that's the idea behind giving chocolates. I
see...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You are very special to me, Trainer. I must take
this opportunity to convey my feelings of
gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Wh-when I say "special," I mean as my trainer, of
course!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, no, but I don't mean that our relationship is
exclusively work-based! I have great affection for
you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah... Um... Well, put simply...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm e-especially grateful to have you in my life!
choice_data_list: Thank you! I'm really happy to hear that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words come out somewhat jumbled, but
Yaeno Muteki's gratitude comes through loud
and clear.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: R-really? That is fortunate...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inside the package are some chocolates and a
baby animal photobook.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I chose the chocolates carefully, but I wasn't sure
what else you might like...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So I thought to give you the photobook I carry
with me every day.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Observing weak and vulnerable creatures helps
me reconnect with the true essence of the Kongo
Yaegaki style—the spirit of protection.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The book also soothes my soul. I guarantee you'll
find it a comfort.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So that's why she gave me her beloved
photobook.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
By the way, that's the sixth volume—the very
latest. It's even newer than the one I have.
choice_data_list:
If you haven't read it yet, how about we look at
it together?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh! I'd be delighted!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! They're adorable... Those teeny pink paw
pads... They're utterly helpless!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a moment! Let me spend just a little more
time with this kitten...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: We have the time, so let's enjoy it at our leisure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere is warm and cozy as Yaeno
Muteki and I enjoy a blissful moment admiring the
pictures of cute animals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inside the package are some chocolates and a
small, cuddly teddy bear.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I chose the chocolates carefully, but I wasn't sure
what else you might like...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: So I thought I'd make you something myself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I did. Sewing a plushie is quite similar to mending
clothes, so I had some experience to draw on.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And... I designed it to match the bear I have in my
room.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's an adorable little thing I received from my
grandparents. It's very precious to me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When I was wondering what to give you, I
remembered how happy I was when I got that
bear.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's why I tried to make yours look the same.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I was wrong to give you something just
because I liked it...
choice_data_list:
Not at all—I'm really happy with it! I'll cherish it
dearly!

Not at all—I'm really happy with it! I'll cherish it
dearly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give the little stuffed toy a gentle squeeze. Its
lopsided ears give it a real handmade charm.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'd like to offer you a piece of advice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That bear is very much like a part of me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So feel free to give it some attention on
occasions when I happen to be absent.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That said, at this very moment, I'm right here in
front of you.
choice_data_list: Are you saying you want me to... hug you?
Are you saying you want me to... hug you?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: To WHAT?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Wh-what are you saying, all of a sudden?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's not at all what I mean!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... My lack of familiarity with events like this
has thrown my composure off!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm suddenly painfully aware of my inexperience!
Argh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This Valentine's Day, not only do I get chocolates
and a gift, but I even get a glimpse of an
expression I've never seen on Yaeno Muteki's
face before.
